<?php /** * Validates a rel/rev link attribute against a directive of allowed values * @note We cannot use Enum because link types allow multiple * values. * @note Assumes link types are ASCII text */ class HTMLPurifier_AttrDef_HTML_LinkTypes extends HTMLPurifier_AttrDef { /** * Name config attribute to pull. * @type string */ protected $name; /** * @param string $name */ public function __construct($name) { $configLookup = array( 'rel' => 'AllowedRel', 'rev' => 'AllowedRev' ); if (!isset($configLookup[$name])) { throw new Exception('Unrecognized attribute name for link relationship.'); } $this->name = $configLookup[$name]; } /** * @param string $string * @param HTMLPurifier_Config $config * @param HTMLPurifier_Context $context * @return bool|string */ public function validate($string, $config, $context) { $allowed = $config->get('Attr.' . $this->name); if (empty($allowed)) { return false; } $string = $this->parseCDATA($string); $parts = explode(' ', $string); // lookup to prevent duplicates $ret_lookup = array(); foreach ($parts as $part) { $part = strtolower(trim($part)); if (!isset($allowed[$part])) { continue; } $ret_lookup[$part] = true; } if (empty($ret_lookup)) { return false; } $string = implode(' ', array_keys($ret_lookup)); return $string; } } // vim: et sw=4 sts=4
